reviews.comment:
Vinimos a merendar no tenian nada, entonces tuvimos que comprar en un kiosco y tampoco nos dejaron entrar para comer adentro por lo que tuvimos que comer con frio afuera, super mal la atencion

(Translated by Google)
We came for a snack and they had nothing, so we had to buy something at a kiosk. They wouldn't let us in to eat inside either, so we had to eat outside in the cold. The service was terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pFeFJWazRhQzFNYWpGNmRGSm9RVE5hWjFaVVlrRRAB

reviews.comment:
Experiencia pésima en la YPF de Los Menucos durante Semana Santa. Inadmisible la demora con solo dos playeros, el almacén prácticamente sin mercadería y los baños en un estado lamentable. Una parada que debería resolverte el viaje termina siendo un problema más. Falta total de organización, previsión y respeto por la gente.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible experience at the YPF gas station in Los Menucos during Holy Week. The wait was unacceptable, with only two attendants, the convenience store was practically empty, and the restrooms were in a deplorable state. A stop that should have made your trip easier ended up being yet another problem. A complete lack of organization, foresight, and respect for customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21sM2VFMUljek5xYW5CSmNUazRXSFpsVmxGdlVrRRAB
